events.event_description: Lincoln MacVeagh presented credentials as the first U.S. Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary to Iceland, establishing a U.S. Legation.

evidence.quote: Lincoln Macveagh, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1941-08-08. Credentials presented: 1941-09-30. Left post on 1942-06-27.

events.event_description: John Joseph Muccio was promoted from Envoy/Minister to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, elevating the U.S. mission in Iceland from a Legation to an Embassy.

evidence.quote: John Joseph Muccio, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1954-08-23. Credentials presented: 1954-10-12. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1955-11-03.
